body_txt: The Scottish people are stereotypically brave fighters. Thus, a Scottish accent is sometimes used to emphasize the boldness of fantasy warriors. Violent Glaswegian is a more negative version of this. Often a characteristic of the Dwarves as well. In the interest of preventing Zero Context Examples , please note that this trope is not about a character having a Scottish accent but rather about how the accent is used to convey bravery, physical/mental toughness, etc.
